message:
fix: use QueryModeError in local-executor + void fire-and-forget promises

local-executor.ts: 6 throw sites used plain Error instead of
QueryModeError — callers couldn't match on error codes (TABLE_NOT_FOUND,
INVALID_FORMAT). Converted all to structured errors with appropriate codes.

query-do.ts: 3 edgeCachePut wrappers discarded promises without void
operator — added explicit void to mark fire-and-forget intent.
